holdings.infoBox: JPUS is an equity ETF with a total of 376 individual holdings. The top holdings are Western Digital stock at 0.76%, Lam Research at 0.74%, KLA Corporation at 0.72%, Applied Materials at 0.69%, and Lumentum Holdings at 0.65%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Diversified Return Use Equity (JPUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of large-cap US stocks selected from the Russell 1000 using relative value, momentum, and quality factors. The fund is weighted for equal risk contribution at the sector level and holdings are equal-weighted within sectors. JPUS was launched on Sep 29, 2015 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
